raw_consumer_statement: I have my payment made with an in-store credit card amounting to {$79.00} on XX/XX/XXXX with a balance of {$370.00}, My payment doesnt reflect vis-a-vis in store credit because when i inquire my balance yesterday XX/XX/24, it remains the same at $ XXXX think this is not the first time.i have with me all the receipts.if they have done this to me, they might be doing this to others because its a big store with branches in all US states.
